full_text: Alice: Good morning everyone. Let us start the sprint planning meeting. Bob: Sure. I think we need to finish the login feature by next Friday. Alice: Agreed. Bob, can you take ownership of that task? Bob: Yes, I will handle it by Friday. Alice: Carol, can you review the design mockups by Wednesday? Carol: Sure, I will get that done by Wednesday. Bob: One risk I see is the API dependency from the backend team. Alice: Good point. Let us flag that as a blocker. Carol: Should we schedule a follow-up meeting to review progress? Alice: Yes, let us meet again next Monday. Bob: Also, the database migration discussion should move to next meeting. Alice agreed. Parking that for later. Thanks everyone.
